summary: Moved DFM object selection into the Details page.
details: Opening a DFM tab now lands directly on Details. The Details Name field has a project/path-scoped selector backed by dfm_method_index.json, and selecting a name uses the normal local method lookup to load that DFM object.

The DFM method index cache now stores only path/name entries, and the Details page groups Project, Reserving Class, and Name under Object Path with Output Vector, Input Triangle, and settings under Method Inputs & Settings.
